base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_idle — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Static brick-block tile — 4-cell brick pattern, used as destructible platform (small Mario bounces off, big Mario breaks). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static brick-block tile — 4-cell brick pattern, used as destructible platform (small Mario bounces off, big Mario breaks)
